hooks.prompt: Before this session ends, check if you have written the session's high-signal work to the knowledge base. If a .brain/ directory exists in the current working directory, you MUST: (1) append today's meaningful decisions, changes, and next actions to .brain/knowledge/daily/YYYY-MM-DD.md (use today's actual date), (2) update .brain/knowledge/projects/<project>.md if project state changed. If no .brain/ exists, write to ~/.claude/knowledge/daily/YYYY-MM-DD.md instead. Only skip if the session had no meaningful technical work (e.g. only questions answered). Do this now using the Write or Edit tool.
